snippets.svelte:
<script>
  import '@kitn.ai/ui/elements';
</script>

<kai-chat
  {messages}
  on:kai-message-action={onMessageAction}
  on:kai-model-change={onModelChange}
  on:kai-search={onSearch}
  on:kai-submit={onSubmit}
  on:kai-suggestion-click={onSuggestionClick}
  on:kai-value-change={onValueChange}
  on:kai-voice={onVoice}
></kai-chat>

snippets.svelte:
<script>
  import '@kitn.ai/ui/elements';
</script>

<kai-composer
  on:kai-blur={onBlur}
  on:kai-entity-add={onEntityAdd}
  on:kai-entity-remove={onEntityRemove}
  on:kai-focus={onFocus}
  on:kai-submit={onSubmit}
  on:kai-trigger={onTrigger}
  on:kai-trigger-close={onTriggerClose}
  on:kai-value-change={onValueChange}
></kai-composer>

snippets.svelte:
<script>
  import '@kitn.ai/ui/elements';
</script>

<kai-workspace
  {groups}
  {conversations}
  {messages}
  on:kai-conversation-select={onConversationSelect}
  on:kai-message-action={onMessageAction}
  on:kai-model-change={onModelChange}
  on:kai-new-chat={onNewChat}
  on:kai-search={onSearch}
  on:kai-sidebar-toggle={onSidebarToggle}
  on:kai-submit={onSubmit}
  on:kai-suggestion-click={onSuggestionClick}
  on:kai-value-change={onValueChange}
  on:kai-voice={onVoice}
></kai-workspace>
